title: Coordinate Map (debug)
subtitle: Sandbox J — Cell numbering reference
intro: Every cell of the master board is labelled with its 1-based coordinate (L#T#) matching XML / rulebook conventions, plus the internal room ID (r01..r22) for our auto-extracted layout. Use this sandbox to verify cell positions when transcribing canonical quest maps. Heroes start in the SW stair area; tick 'Reveal entire map' in the lobby to flood-reveal every cell at once. NO monsters, doors, furniture, or traps — just the labelled grid.

objective.text: Walk to the centre (L13 T9, the canonical Verag spot) to confirm the grid lines up with XML coords.

objectives.text: Reach NW corner L1T2 (canonical rubble spot)
